mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1.3 million units signals a strengthening demand for residential construction, which boosts consumer confidence and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST > 1.3M are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in industrial production below 108 indicates a weakening supply chain, which reduces production costs and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO < 108 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 4-month increase in payroll employment above 152,000 thousand persons signals a strengthening labor market, which boosts consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in periods with PAYEMS > 152K are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in the federal funds rate below 1.5% signals a monetary easing cycle, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS < 1.5% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above 19121 billion dollars signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which boosts consumer confidence and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 > 19121B are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in industrial production below 109 signals a weakening supply chain, which reduces production costs and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO < 109 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 4-month increase in payroll employment above 152,000 thousand persons signals a strengthening labor market, which boosts consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in periods with PAYEMS > 152K are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in the federal funds rate below 1.5% signals a monetary easing cycle, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS < 1.5% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)
